title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.398 - Application to all group policies — effective, when
text:
376.398.  Application to all group policies — effective, when. — The provisions of sections 376.395 to 376.404 shall become effective January 1, 1983, and shall apply to all group policies delivered, issued for delivery or amended on or after January 1, 1983.
(L. 1981 S.B. 58 § A) 
Effective 1-01-83
